title: Mumbai-Style Fenugreek Fritters
description: Crispy fritters made with fenugreek, perfect for a snack or appetizer. This recipe is inspired by the street food of Mumbai.
instructions: 1. Chop the fenugreek leaves and mix with rice flour, spices, and salt.
2. Heat oil in a deep frying pan and drop spoonfuls of the fenugreek mixture into the oil.
3. Fry until golden brown and crispy.
4. Drain on paper towels and serve hot.
5. To make the stir-fry onions, heat some oil in a pan and sauté until caramelized.
6. To make the fry garlic, heat some oil in a pan and fry until golden brown.
7. Mix the caramelized onions and fried garlic into the fenugreek mixture.
8. Serve the fritters hot with a dollop of chutney or ketchup.
9. Adjust the seasoning and spice levels to taste.
